item.title: Transfer rumors, news: Spurs, Newcastle eye former Liverpool striker Núñez
item.description: Tottenham Hotspur and Newcastle United are among the clubs interested in signing Al Hilal striker Darwin Núñez. Transfer Talk has the latest.

item.title: Messi struggles in MLS opener, will it impact his World Cup hopes?
item.description: Lionel Messi had a decent game in the 3-0 defeat to LAFC, but decent isn't what you expect from him, especially during a World Cup year.

item.title: Garcia wrests Barrios' WBC title in one-sided win
item.description: Ryan Garcia delivered perhaps the most complete performance of his career, dropping Mario Barrios early and cruising to a unaniomous decision to win t...

item.title: UCLA swats 'negativity,' authors 23-point rally
item.description: Donovan Dent hit a layup at the buzzer in overtime to lift UCLA over No. 10 Illinois 95-94 on Saturday after the Bruins rallied from a 23-point defici...

item.title: Former Purdue, NFL receiver Moore dies at 25
item.description: Former Purdue and NFL wide receiver Rondale Moore died Saturday at the age of 25, according to the Minnesota Vikings.
